channel.title: Livakivi
channel.description: Hello. I make videos primarily to share thoughts about various topics I find interesting. So far, they've mostly been about language learning, but I have many videos planned about other topics as well, such as art, programming, games, and so on!
channel.itunes:author: Livakivi
channel.itunes:subtitle: Livakivi
channel.itunes:summary: Hello. I make videos primarily to share thoughts about various topics I find interesting. So far, they've mostly been about language learning, but I have many videos planned about other topics as well, such as art, programming, games, and so on!

item.title: This Book is AMAZING for Learning Japanese (The Courage to Be Disliked)
item.description:
Have some courage to be HATED, you RAT.
The book: 嫌われる勇気 Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Livakivi Migaku reflink (1 extra month for free + support the channel): https://migaku.io/free-month/Livakivi Migaku tutorial: https://youtu.be/2xFe_juNmfk
MUSIC: Kyou Nakanishi - 結婚できない男 Autechre - Kalpol Introl Persona 5 OST - Beneath the Mask OSRS OST - Jungle Island
CHAPTERS: 00:00 I just finished reading 嫌われる勇気 00:30 Dialog-based plot 01:05 It's engaging 01:30 It's relatively simple (sorta) 02:00 Amazing audiobook! 02:25 Why use an audiobook 03:00 Audiobook + Reading at the same time 3:20 MY SETUP 5:45 Word colors/statuses 6:25 Text to speech 6:58 AI lookups for grammar/confusing words 7:30 Would be nice to have subtitles from the book+audio 8:03 I found the book in 2023 8:40 "Responsible" rejection of self-sacrifice 9:19 Teleological perspective 9:34 Living in the present, but.. 9:48 Separating of interpersonal tasks 10:05 A new perspective 10:25 Wtf I love reading now 11:05 Outro
________________________________ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Livakivi Migaku reflink (1 extra month for free + support the channel): https://migaku.io/free-month/Livakivi
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Livakivi Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/Livakivi Discord: https://discord.com/invite/w6qyB5mpWa Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/BudgetLivakivi
item.itunes:author: Livakivi
item.itunes:subtitle: This Book is AMAZING for Learning Japanese (The Courage to Be Disliked)
item.itunes:summary:
Have some courage to be HATED, you RAT.
The book: 嫌われる勇気 Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Livakivi Migaku reflink (1 extra month for free + support the channel): https://migaku.io/free-month/Livakivi Migaku tutorial: https://youtu.be/2xFe_juNmfk
MUSIC: Kyou Nakanishi - 結婚できない男 Autechre - Kalpol Introl Persona 5 OST - Beneath the Mask OSRS OST - Jungle Island
CHAPTERS: 00:00 I just finished reading 嫌われる勇気 00:30 Dialog-based plot 01:05 It's engaging 01:30 It's relatively simple (sorta) 02:00 Amazing audiobook! 02:25 Why use an audiobook 03:00 Audiobook + Reading at the same time 3:20 MY SETUP 5:45 Word colors/statuses 6:25 Text to speech 6:58 AI lookups for grammar/confusing words 7:30 Would be nice to have subtitles from the book+audio 8:03 I found the book in 2023 8:40 "Responsible" rejection of self-sacrifice 9:19 Teleological perspective 9:34 Living in the present, but.. 9:48 Separating of interpersonal tasks 10:05 A new perspective 10:25 Wtf I love reading now 11:05 Outro
________________________________ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Livakivi Migaku reflink (1 extra month for free + support the channel): https://migaku.io/free-month/Livakivi
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Livakivi Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/Livakivi Discord: https://discord.com/invite/w6qyB5mpWa Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/BudgetLivakivi

item.title: What Do I Think of Japanese Pitch Accent? (QnA 2)
item.description:
In this QnA, I will answer 13 questions! (February + March QnA from Patreon) Leave your questions for the April QnA (won't be a video): https://www.patreon.com/posts/125540890
MUSIC: The Fly Guy Five - Small Talk and Lemonade Akitoshi Igarashi & Yoshitaka Akimitsu - I Hadn't Anyone Till You
CHAPTERS: 00:00 What will I paint this time??? 00:17 1: When and whether to learn Pitch Accent? 1:55 2: Have or will you read philosophy? 4:03 3: Do you use habit tracking apps? 4:50 4: What resources did you use for learning Russian? 5:35 5: Should you sentence mine at 500 words? 6:53 6: Anki intra day learning? 8:00 7: Does learning new words get easier as you improve? 8:40 8: Any drawing videos planned? Beksinski? 9:20 9: What are you most interested in drawing? Favorite artists? 10:28 10: Should I do more at 400 words? 11:30 11: Going to Japan in a month. How to improve before that? 12:30 12: How do you organize your work? 13:20 13: Advice for heartbreak/depression? 15:28 Next QnA? 15:54 THE PAINTING!
________________________________ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Livakivi Migaku reflink (1 extra month for free + support the channel): https://migaku.io/free-month/Livakivi
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Livakivi Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/Livakivi Discord: https://discord.com/invite/w6qyB5mpWa Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/BudgetLivakivi

item.itunes:subtitle: What Do I Think of Japanese Pitch Accent? (QnA 2)

In this QnA, I will answer 13 questions! (February + March QnA from Patreon) Leave your questions for the April QnA (won't be a video): https://www.patreon.com/posts/125540890

CHAPTERS: 00:00 What will I paint this time??? 00:17 1: When and whether to learn Pitch Accent? 1:55 2: Have or will you read philosophy? 4:03 3: Do you use habit tracking apps? 4:50 4: What resources did you use for learning Russian? 5:35 5: Should you sentence mine at 500 words? 6:53 6: Anki intra day learning? 8:00 7: Does learning new words get easier as you improve? 8:40 8: Any drawing videos planned? Beksinski? 9:20 9: What are you most interested in drawing? Favorite artists? 10:28 10: Should I do more at 400 words? 11:30 11: Going to Japan in a month. How to improve before that? 12:30 12: How do you organize your work? 13:20 13: Advice for heartbreak/depression? 15:28 Next QnA? 15:54 THE PAINTING!
